creative.availability: Authorized to work in the U.S. · Available for hybrid/remote work
creative.summary: Game audio engineer and sound designer with a foundation built in two demanding schools: the U.S. Marine Corps and Full Sail University. Specializing in Wwise implementation, spatial audio, foley, SFX design, interactive media, and AI-assisted audio tooling. BS in Audio Production (2023). Certified in Pro Tools, Wwise 101, and FMOD Fundamentals.

bullets: Creating custom SFX for EVOC, an emergency training simulator game.
Contributing sound design work for interactive training scenarios and in-game audio feedback.

experience.role: Freelance Game Audio Engineer & Sound Designer
bullets: Designed and implemented spatial ambience systems for horror game environments using Wwise, including full audio hierarchy, event naming, and positional audio triggered by character position.
Recorded, edited, and implemented complete character foley packages, including movement sounds and voice-based vocalizations using original source material.
Completed cinematic audio redesign and interactive SFX implementation for Unity Technologies' Blacksmith demo, designing all SFX from scratch and iterating in Wwise until game-correct.
Published Obsolete Machines Vol. 1, a field-recorded SFX library distributed through Gumroad and itch.io.
Built Vocal Architect, an AI-powered vocal signal-chain tool deployed at tools.syzygyent.com.
Structured playtesting for unreleased game titles under NDA, covering UI/UX, controls, audio bugs, and release readiness.
Delivered professional bug reports with severity ratings, reproduction steps, and design recommendations.
Directed live studio productions and municipal meetings while operating BroadcastPix, editing in Adobe Premiere, and managing MAM workflows.
Built a technical foundation in audio communications and signal systems while leading Marines in high-pressure operational environments requiring fast problem-solving and clear communication.

education: AS in Computer Science, Software Development — CT State Community College (Expected August 2027)
BS in Audio Production — Full Sail University (2023)

ats.summary: Game audio engineer and sound designer with experience in audio implementation, field recording, foley, and interactive media. Proficient in Wwise, FMOD, Pro Tools, and Unreal Engine, with hands-on work in spatial audio, ambience systems, SFX, dialogue editing, and game-focused sound design. U.S. Marine Corps veteran with 9.5 years of service, bringing disciplined execution, fast technical troubleshooting, and high-pressure reliability to every project.
skills: Audio Implementation: Wwise, FMOD, Unreal Engine (audio), spatial audio, interactive audio systems
DAWs & Software: Pro Tools, Adobe Premiere, Ableton, FL Studio, Logic Pro
Sound Design: Foley recording, SFX design, field recording, dialogue editing, ambience design
Workflow Tools: Jira, Git, MAM systems, BroadcastPix
Other: Bilingual (English/Spanish), QA playtesting, bug documentation, technical writing

bullets: Creating custom SFX for EVOC, an emergency training simulator game.
Contributing sound design work for interactive training scenarios and in-game audio feedback.

experience.role: Freelance Game Audio Engineer & Sound Designer
bullets: Designed and implemented spatial ambience systems for horror game environments using Wwise, including full audio hierarchy setup and positional audio triggered by character position.
Recorded, edited, and implemented complete character foley packages including movement sounds and voice-based vocalizations for game protagonists.
Performed cinematic audio redesign and interactive SFX implementation for Unity Technologies' Blacksmith demo environment.
Created and published original SFX libraries, including Obsolete Machines Vol. 1, available on Gumroad and itch.io.
Built Vocal Architect, an AI-powered vocal signal-chain tool for engineers and producers, deployed at tools.syzygyent.com.
Mixed and mastered vocal-driven music projects and completed dialogue cleanup and restoration in Pro Tools.
Conduct structured playtesting sessions for unreleased game titles under NDA.
Document UI/UX issues, control-scheme feedback, audio bugs, and release readiness assessments.
Deliver detailed bug reports covering reproduction steps, severity ratings, and design recommendations.
Direct live studio productions, including multi-camera shows and municipal meetings.
Operate BroadcastPix systems for camera switching, graphics, and audio monitoring.
Edit broadcast content in Adobe Premiere and manage MAM workflows for ingest and archiving.
Developed a technical foundation in audio communications systems and signal troubleshooting under high-pressure operational conditions.
Led and trained Marines in time-critical environments requiring fast technical problem-solving and clear communication.
Honorably discharged at the rank of Sergeant (E-5).
